entities.name: MALE STERILITY
entities.description: A condition where the plant cannot produce functional pollen, governed by a recessive gene.

entities.name: MS1 GENE
entities.description: A single recessive gene that governs male sterility in pigeonpea.

entities.name: ICPH 8
entities.description: The first commercial hybrid of pigeonpea developed using genetic male sterility.

entities.name: SEED PRODUCTION
entities.description: The commercial process of producing seeds for male steriles and hybrids.

entities.name: MANUAL ROGUING
entities.description: The practice of removing fertile plants from rows of female plants during seed production.

entities.name: TEMPERATURE SENSITIVITY
entities.description: A trait that may be linked to the male-sterile gene ms1.

entities.name: GENETIC MARKER
entities.description: A DNA sequence used to identify specific traits, such as male sterility.
